programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake analyzes the swings of Bryson DeChambeau and long drive champions to find the secret to distance off the tee. Learn creative drills for making a bigger backswing turn, using ground forces, and creating more clubhead speed.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches how to play the key shots faced on the final 3 holes at TPC Sawgrass with setup and swing tips for long irons, wedges, and pressure-packed tee shots.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake reveals the three major reasons people hit slices and teaches the cure for each; learn how to hit draws on command like Rory McIlroy, sequence a swing like Fred Couples and use a cell phone as an anti-slice training aid.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches pitching and putting tips to help scramble to more pars and lower scores; learn short game drills used by Tiger Woods, Seve Ballesteros and Jon Rahm.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake uses the best players in the world to answer questions; learning how to fix alignment like Jack Nicklaus; swinging with better weight shift like Jon Rahm; improving through impact like Justin Thomas.

programme.title: The Golf Fix

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches a detailed plan to improve practice and take those new skills to the course; learning a practice habit made famous by Tiger Woods and a simple stroke saver used by Rory McIlroy.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches how the arms, shoulders, torso and legs should work for a proper swing sequence; learning drills to stop casting from Xander Schauffele; maximizing distance from Rory McIlroy.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches a variety of shots with a variety of clubs to help a player become a short game wizard; learn the benefits of hitting one-handed pitch shots, how to play the super high flop shot and a short game tip from Jack Nicklaus.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches the key checkpoints in a swing to help crush a driver like Rory.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches how to correct the biggest swing faults caused by poor lower body action.
